description_long: This lamppost features a rustic, wooden vertical post with a natural, slightly irregular shape, mounted on a solid, square concrete base. A horizontal wooden arm extends from the upper section of the post, supported by a diagonal brace, creating a sturdy T-shaped structure. Suspended from the end of the arm is a small, lantern-style lamp with a hexagonal body and a pale yellow glass or plastic enclosure, attached by a short metal or rope loop. The wood grain is visible, giving the post a handcrafted, organic appearance, while the concrete base provides stability and a utilitarian look. The lamp head is simple and functional, with no visible decorative elements or additional attachments. This lamppost would be well-suited for parks, pathways, or rustic urban environments.
description: A rustic wooden lamppost with a concrete base and a small, hexagonal lantern hanging from a horizontal arm. The design is simple and functional, with visible wood grain and no decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full wooden post, horizontal arm, and lantern hanging clearly from the end.
description_view_1: Side view with the post and lantern aligned, showing the narrow profile and the lantern's hexagonal shape.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the wooden post and arm, with the lantern visible at the far end.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the post's thickness and the lantern barely visible from behind the arm.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Hexagonal lantern with pale yellow panels and a simple hanging loop
